request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-05-11T15:46:59Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-05-11T15:45:33Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/05/11 15:48:34.275553377 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275584526 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275585580 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275602678 useKerning, fillOddEven, compress)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275610076 {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275625405 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275626429 new <- list()
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275637061 if (!missing(width))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275637773 new$width <- width
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275645196 if (!missing(height))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275654263 new$height <- height
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275655072 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275666588 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275667349 if (!missing(title))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275678275 new$title <- title
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275679020 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275689454 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275690173 if (!missing(version))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275701491 new$version <- version
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275702230 if (!missing(paper))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275713832 new$paper <- paper
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275714612 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275725432 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275726902 if (!missing(bg))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275742046 new$bg <- bg
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275742818 if (!missing(fg))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275753403 new$fg <- fg
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275754077 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275767798 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275768751 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275795445 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275796458 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275820830 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275822069 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275850712 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275851380 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275858522 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275858917 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275865649 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275866083 if (!missing(compress))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275900548 new$compress <- compress
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275901481 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275918471 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275919238 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275928755 enc <- family$encoding
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275929190 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275937095 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275937522 "default"))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275944826 old$encoding <- enc
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275945230 family <- family$metrics
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275976214 }
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275977145 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/05/11 15:48:34.275998996 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276000834 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276013503 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276013996 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276021016 }
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276021513 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276027215 }
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276027613 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276053722 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276055727 if (is.null(pf))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276062637 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276069214 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276076524 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276076951 }
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276082575 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276082986 old$family <- family
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276089694 }
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276090097 version <- old$version
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276095378 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276096118 "2.0")
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276101990 if (version %in% versions)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276102400 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276110279 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276111073 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276123796 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276129434 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276138796 domain = NA)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276139229 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276146809 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276147269 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276156017 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276156437 old$fillOddEven, old$compress)
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276164433 invisible()
2026/05/11 15:48:34.276164886 }
